meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Fix No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap using the Antigravity project template and Claude Code. A masterclass for freelancers to ship professional work fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by shipping high-value, niche-specific prototypes rather than generic clones. By leveraging the Antigravity template with Claude Code, you can scaffold, build, and deploy production-ready SaaS modules in hours, giving clients immediate proof of your engineering velocity and technical precision.
content.intro:
You’re staring at an empty GitHub profile, the silence of a blank screen deafening as you pitch to high-ticket clients. The 'no portfolio' deadlock is a rite of passage for every developer, but it’s one you must break with surgical precision. Clients don’t care about your resume; they care about speed, reliability, and the ability to turn an idea into a functional asset.

This is where the Antigravity project template changes the game. By combining structured architecture with the raw power of Claude Code, you stop writing boilerplate and start shipping solutions. We’re moving beyond tutorials into high-velocity production, turning your development environment into a factory for professional-grade SaaS deliverables.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity standard to ensure enterprise-grade folder organization and type safety from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define the Domain Model
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate your database schema based on a specific client niche to show domain expertise immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based AI content tool with tables for users, credits, and generated_content.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on the antigravity data model'

steps.title: Implement Auth & Security
steps.description: Secure your app immediately. Clients value security-first development as a premium skill.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Clerk authentication within the Antigravity layout structure, ensuring protected server actions.

steps.title: Build the Core Feature
steps.description: Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a painful problem, demonstrating your ability to ship usable software.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a server-side action that calls the OpenAI API to generate a summary and stores it in the database.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: A portfolio project isn't real until it's live. Use automated deployment to prove you can handle the full lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Vercel deployment settings and environment variables for the current Antigravity project.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Request a Feature' button in your portfolio projects to demonstrate you build with user feedback loops in mind.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your core logic; clients trust developers who ship with 80%+ test coverage.
Customize the Antigravity README to explain the 'Why' behind your architecture choices rather than just listing tech stacks.
Keep your repository private until the feature is polished, then use 'git squash' to show a clean, professional commit history.
Record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the app and link it in the README; it converts 3x better than code alone.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, add your live project link to your LinkedIn and Twitter bio, then reach out to three potential clients with a personalized video walkthrough of the app you just built.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project to find you. Build the solution that proves your worth today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
